description: This file defines a Java interface for a repository managing RefreshToken entities, extending Spring Data JPA's JpaRepository. It includes a method for finding tokens by their hash.

classes.name: RefreshTokenRepository
classes.description: A Spring Data JPA repository interface for managing RefreshToken entities, with a custom method to find refresh tokens by their hash.

methods.name: findByTokenHash
methods.description: Retrieves an Optional containing the RefreshToken matching the provided token hash.
